channel.title: Maryland MVA Study Podcast
channel.description: Audio review materials for the Maryland Driver's License Exam. Study for the MVA knowledge test with chapter-by-chapter audio guides covering traffic laws, safe driving practices, and road signs.
channel.itunes:author: MVA Study Guide
channel.itunes:summary: Prepare for your Maryland driver's license exam with these audio study guides. Covers both the Driver's Manual and Rookie Manual with detailed explanations, memory tricks, and practice questions.

item.title: Rookie Ch.25: Chapter 25
item.description: Rookie Manual Chapter 25 - Maryland MVA study material.
item.itunes:summary: Rookie Manual Chapter 25 - Maryland MVA study material.

item.description: Rookie Manual Chapter 24 - Maryland MVA study material.
item.itunes:summary: Rookie Manual Chapter 24 - Maryland MVA study material.

item.title: Driver Ch.10: Insurance and Safety
item.description: Insurance requirements and vehicle safety.
item.itunes:summary: Insurance requirements and vehicle safety.

item.title: Driver Ch.9: Other Restrictions
item.description: License restrictions, violations, and penalties.
item.itunes:summary: License restrictions, violations, and penalties.

item.title: Driver Ch.8: Crashes and Traffic Stops
item.description: What to do in case of a crash and during traffic stops.
item.itunes:summary: What to do in case of a crash and during traffic stops.

item.title: Driver Ch.7: Sharing the Road
item.description: Sharing the road with pedestrians, bicyclists, and other vehicles.
item.itunes:summary: Sharing the road with pedestrians, bicyclists, and other vehicles.

item.title: Driver Ch.6: Parking
item.description: Parking rules, parallel parking, and parking restrictions.
item.itunes:summary: Parking rules, parallel parking, and parking restrictions.

item.title: Driver Ch.5: Traffic Signs and Signals
item.description: Understanding traffic signs, signals, and road markings.
item.itunes:summary: Understanding traffic signs, signals, and road markings.

item.title: Driver Ch.4: Speed and Right-of-Way
item.description: Speed limits, following distances, and right-of-way rules at intersections.
item.itunes:summary: Speed limits, following distances, and right-of-way rules at intersections.

item.title: Driver Ch.3: Basic Driving
item.description: Defensive driving, right-of-way rules, speed control, following distance, and lane driving.
item.itunes:summary: Defensive driving, right-of-way rules, speed control, following distance, and lane driving.

item.title: Driver Ch.2: The Maryland GDL System
item.description: Understand Maryland's Graduated Driver Licensing system for first-time drivers.
item.itunes:summary: Understand Maryland's Graduated Driver Licensing system for first-time drivers.

item.title: Driver Ch.1: Driving Tests Requirements
item.description: Learn about the three licensing requirements for Maryland: vision screening, knowledge test, and driving skills test.
item.itunes:summary: Learn about the three licensing requirements for Maryland: vision screening, knowledge test, and driving skills test.
